summary: @ZayvenKnox: An Anthropic engineer paid for my espresso at Sightglass when he saw my screen I was running my Polymarket bot from the
whyItMatters: An Anthropic engineer paid for my espresso at Sightglass when he saw my screen I was running my Polymarket bot from the counter. He was next in line. Looked over my shoulder. Stopped scrolling. "That's not a normal trading app. What's it actually running on" I told him. Claude Code. Four repos. $25 a month. He sat down without asking. "I'm on the agent team…
